meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Deployment
content.seo_description: Master deployment with the Antigravity project template. A professional, advanced-level guide for students to ship real-world apps using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is usually a configuration mismatch, not a code defect. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your environment, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure-as-code. Pair this with Claude Code to automate your deployment orchestration, ensuring a production-ready state that abstracts away the complexity of manual cloud server configuration.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect feature set, only to hit the infamous 'it works on my machine' wall. The silence of a failed deployment is the rite of passage for every developer, but it shouldn't be your final destination. In the high-stakes world of SaaS, code that doesn't ship is invisible code.

We are moving beyond local development. Today, you will leverage the Antigravity project template—the industry standard for rapid, robust application lifecycle management. By integrating this with Claude Code, you’ll transform your deployment process from a manual nightmare into a hardened, automated pipeline. Let’s ship your project.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure that separates concerns and ensures environment parity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity template, ensuring full support for environment variable injection and docker-compose orchestration.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code
steps.description: Define your cloud requirements inside the template so deployment targets are automatically provisioned.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current tech stack and update the antigravity.yaml file to provision a scalable cloud environment optimized for low-latency requests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure infrastructure per antigravity.yaml specs'

steps.title: Automate Secret Management
steps.description: Never hardcode keys. Use the template's built-in vault integration to handle sensitive credentials securely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for hardcoded credentials and migrate them to the Antigravity secret vault implementation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'secure vault integration for environment variables'

steps.title: Build the Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Set up the automated CI/CD flow that triggers whenever you push to your main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow within the Antigravity template that executes testing, linting, and automated cloud deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate cicd pipeline for antigravity deployment'

steps.title: Validate and Execute Ship
steps.description: Perform a final pre-flight check to ensure your app is ready for global traffic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Execute a pre-deployment health check on the Antigravity containerized services and initiate the production push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'validate and deploy to production'

pro_tips: Always use environment-specific flag sets in your antigravity.yaml to prevent staging data from polluting production databases.
Leverage Claude Code to write integration tests for your deployment pipeline before you push to production.
Implement health-check endpoints in your app that Antigravity can monitor to trigger auto-restarts on failure.
Keep your build artifacts small by utilizing multi-stage Dockerfiles within your template structure.
Audit your deployment logs using Claude Code to identify bottlenecks in your container startup time.
content.next_steps: Once your app is live, monitor the metrics dashboard provided by the Antigravity template to optimize performance and scale your resources as your user base grows.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same deployment architecture used by senior engineers to ship SaaS products at scale. Stop struggling with configuration and start focusing on the features your users actually need. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
